title: Vibrant Mustardy Indian Chicken Vindaloo
description: A light and flavorful Maharashtrian dish featuring chicken cooked in a mustardy sauce with rapeseed oil, this vindaloo is a satvik-friendly option for those looking for a delicious and healthy meal.
instructions: Heat the rapeseed oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the mustard seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the garam masala, turmeric, red chili powder, and salt to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the chopped cilantro, white vinegar, and water to the pan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir the vindaloo occasionally as it cooks to prevent the sauce from sticking to the pan.
After 20 minutes, remove the pan from the heat and let the vindaloo cool slightly before serving.
